titles.title: I Love You Lord Greater Than Anything

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I love You, Lord, Greater than anything I love You, Lord More than my heart could sing I love You, Lord More than I love myself I love You, Lord I love You, Lord I love You, Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I worship You High above everything I worship You With all that my heart could sing I worship You O let my life give praise I love You I love You I love You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I lift my hands I am a sacrifice I lift my hands My body and soul a prize I lift my hands All that I have is Yours I lift my hands I lift my hands I lift my hands

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah! This is my song of praise Hallelujah! I'll worship You all my days Hallelujah! All that I am is Yours Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
